name: directive-vs-decision-boundary
description: A pragmatic user directive and an epistemic fact must land in different sections, with negatives proving the boundary.

prior.content: @gmail @calendar — Help me coordinate Alice's vendor review this week.
I'll inspect the relevant Gmail thread, then check calendar availability.

messages.body: Alice is my manager for this review, and she prefers morning slots.

prior.content: For the rest of this run, stage every calendar change before committing it
Understood. I will stage calendar changes before committing them.

inFlightTail.content: Checking calendar availability for morning slots.

assertions.contains: For the rest of this run, stage every calendar change before committing it

assertions.absent: For the rest of this run, stage every calendar change before committing it
